app.title: Inventory Edge Shell
app.subtitle: Offline-first frontline edge shell for inventory capture
sync.authRequired: Authentication required - sign in again to resume sync.
sync.setupError: Offline storage is unavailable on this device.
capture.testDescription: Records a local shell test event before central sync.
bootstrap.firstSyncBody: Connect this device once before offline capture is available.
nav.label: Primary navigation
errors.INVALID_EVENT_ENVELOPE: The captured event format is invalid. Contact support.
errors.UNTAGGED_TRANSACTION: The event is missing required business tags.
errors.STREAM_CONFLICT: This event conflicts with the latest central state.
errors.CALIBRATION_LOCKOUT: The referenced instrument is locked by calibration status.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Not enough available stock at that location for this allocation.
errors.LOT_EXPIRED: The selected lot has expired and cannot be issued without an override.
errors.LOT_ON_HOLD: The selected lot is on quality hold and cannot be issued.
errors.DUPLICATE_LOT: This lot already exists in the system.
errors.DUPLICATE_SERIAL: This serial number already exists in the system for this item.
errors.SERIAL_REQUIRED: This item requires serial numbers to be specified.
errors.SERIAL_NOT_ALLOWED: This item is not configured for serial-number capture.
errors.SERIAL_NOT_AVAILABLE: The selected serial number is not available at this location or lot.
errors.NO_AVAILABLE_LOT: No lot is available for selection with the requested quantity.
errors.LOT_NOT_FOUND: The specified lot was not found in the system.
errors.LOT_REQUIRED: This item is lot-controlled and requires a lot to be specified.
errors.SERIAL_NOT_FOUND: One or more serial numbers were not found in the system.
errors.ITEM_NOT_FOUND: The specified item was not found in the system.
errors.FUNCTION_ACCESS_DENIED: You are not authorized to perform this action.
errors.LOCATION_ACCESS_DENIED: This device is not authorized for that site.
errors.VALUATION_METHOD_NOT_PERMITTED: That valuation method is not permitted for this item.
errors.NRV_RECOVERY_EXCEEDS_ORIGINAL_COS: This recovery would carry the item above its original cost and cannot be recorded.
errors.APPROVAL_REQUIRED: This transfer requires approval before it can proceed.
errors.QUANTITY_EXCEEDS_APPROVED: The requested quantity exceeds the approved amount.
errors.LOT_MISMATCH: The received lot does not match the shipped lot.
errors.LOT_SKU_MISMATCH: That lot does not belong to the selected item.
errors.SERIAL_MISMATCH: The serials do not match the transfer request.
errors.APPROVAL_UNRESOLVED: No approver is available for this transfer. Contact a supervisor.
errors.COUNT_TASK_LOCKED: This cycle count has already been submitted and cannot be changed.
errors.COUNT_ENTERER_CANNOT_APPROVE: The person who entered the count cannot approve its adjustment.
errors.PERIOD_LOCKED: This period is locked; the verification record can no longer be changed.
errors.COUNT_VARIANCE_REQUIRES_APPROVAL: This count variance requires approval before it can be adjusted.
errors.STOCK_ADJUSTMENT_NEGATIVE_BALANCE: This adjustment would drive stock below zero or below reserved quantity.
errors.LEAD_TIME_NOT_CONFIGURED: A lead time must be set for this item and location before safety stock can be computed.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_DEMAND_HISTORY: There is not enough demand history to compute safety stock for this item yet.
errors.INVALID_SERVICE_LEVEL: That service level is not supported. Choose 90%, 95%, 97.5%, or 99%.
errors.PLANNING_PARAMS_NOT_FOUND: No planning parameters are configured for this item and location.
errors.OBSOLESCENCE_THRESHOLD_NOT_CONFIG: An obsolescence threshold must be set before this item can be scanned for aging.
errors.OWNERSHIP_AGREEMENT_NOT_FOUND: No active consignment or VMI agreement exists for this item at this location.
errors.OWNER_PARTY_MISMATCH: The supplier on this receipt does not match the active ownership agreement.
errors.VMI_MIN_NOT_CONFIGURED: A VMI minimum quantity must be set on the agreement before the VMI check can run.
errors.INVALID_SIGNAL_TYPE: That replenishment signal type is not supported.
